embeds.title: Run your DayZ server like a pro.
embeds.description:
Citadel is a desktop control center built for people who actually run servers — not a SaaS panel that breaks every time the host has a bad day.

It runs **on your machine**, talks directly to your server, and ships with the tools you used to need five different apps for. Stop tab-juggling. Start managing.

Made by an admin, for admins. Every feature in here exists because *we* needed it first.

fields.name: ⚡  Real-Time
fields.value: Live map · player tools · kill feed · chat log

fields.name: 🛠️  Full Editor Suite
fields.value: Types · Events · Globals · Spawn Points · Loot Visualizer

fields.name: 🛡️  Built-In Protection
fields.value: Global Ban DB · CFTools import · audit log

embeds.title: ⚡  Live Operations
embeds.description: Everything happening on your server, in one place — and one click away from action. The kind of stuff that *should* have always been one click away.

fields.name: 🗺️  Live Map
fields.value:
Every player and vehicle, real time, on a proper satellite map. Click a marker to ban, kick, teleport, or pull a full inventory snapshot. Right-click a vehicle to teleport, refuel, repair, or destroy it.

*Works on Chernarus, Livonia, Sakhal, Namalsk, Banov, Esseker, Pripyat, Rostow, Alteria, Deer Isle, and Takistan+.*

fields.name: 👥  Player Tools — Right-Click Anything
fields.value: Heal · Kill · Kick · **Ban** · Freeze · God Mode · **Teleport** (click-to-place) · **Add to Priority Queue** · Get full profile. No more copy-pasting Steam IDs into seven different forms.

fields.name: 📓  Persistent Player Profiles
fields.value:
Survives wipes. Tracks sessions, IPs, aliases, kill/death history, chat history, admin notes — **and** the player's last-known gear, vitals, and position from the live mod.

Forensics-grade. "What gear did this duper have last time?" — answered in two clicks.

fields.name: 💬  Kill Feed & Chat Log
fields.value: Live PvP feed with headshot rate, longest kill, and per-player leaderboards. Searchable chat history with channel filters and direct-to-profile links. Every chat line is one click away from the speaker's full file.

embeds.title: 🛠️  Server Builders' Suite
embeds.description: Edit anything. See everything. No more hand-rolling XML in Notepad and praying it doesn't crash on boot.

fields.name: 🎒  Economy Editors
fields.value:
**Types · Events · Globals · Spawnable Types · Spawn Points · Limits Definition · Economy Core**

Full-depth editors with sane defaults, schema validation, and instant deploy. Bulk-edit by category. **Diff against vanilla** before you save so you always know what changed.

fields.name: 🔍  Loot Visualizer
fields.value: See exactly where each item spawns, how often, and at what nominal/min counts — overlaid on the live map. Catch loot deserts and over-tuned categories *before* your players do.

fields.name: 🧩  Mod Configs
fields.value: First-class editors for **DayZ Expansion** (Trader, Quests, Markers, Spawn Selection, Vehicles), **DabsFramework**, and a generic mod-config framework that auto-detects loaded mods. Add a mod, edit it the same day.

fields.name: 📁  Files Browser & Live Console
fields.value: Built-in Monaco editor for any file in your server tree (syntax highlighting, undo history, autosave). Live RCON console with command history and tab-completion.

embeds.title: 🛡️  Trust, Safety & Honest Pricing
embeds.description: The features that big-tool vendors keep behind paywalls — built in. Plus a price that doesn't punish solo admins.

fields.name: 🌐  Citadel Cloud — Global Ban DB
fields.value:
Every Citadel Cloud customer contributes their bans to a shared pool. Your server is automatically protected against everyone else's known cheaters — surgical merges that **never stomp** your local bans.

Three-vouch threshold · public appeals · transparent moderation queue. **No more bad-actor cross-server hops.**

fields.name: 📥  CFTools Migration
fields.value: One-click import of your existing CFTools banlist — paged, deduped, filtered to Steam64 IDs. Bring your history with you when you switch.

fields.name: 💸  Pricing
fields.value:
**Citadel** — $14.99/mo · $149.99/yr (save 17%)
**+ Citadel Cloud** — $10/mo (Global Ban DB · off-site backups · more)

**No per-server tax. No "enterprise" tier.**
One license = unlimited servers from one desktop.

embeds.title: 🤝  Built With the Community
embeds.description: Citadel is shipped fast and listened-to harder. Every roadmap item has a name behind it — usually an admin who hit the same wall you're hitting now.

fields.name: 💬  Join the Discord
fields.value: Feature requests, bug reports, server-admin shop talk, and direct line to the dev. **[discord.gg/citadel →](https://discord.gg/citadel)**

fields.name: 🌐  Website & Docs
fields.value:
Download, sign up, read the docs. **[citadels.cc →](https://citadels.cc)**
Free 7-day trial on Citadel Cloud.

fields.name: 🚀  What's New
fields.value: **v2.17.0** — Live Dashboard click-to-place actions · right-click Ban / Priority · player snapshot profiles · in-house map tile cache · weather + FPS mod fixes. Auto-update is rolling out now.

fields.name: ⭐  Why Citadel?
fields.value: Because no one should have to maintain a real DayZ community out of seven browser tabs and a Notepad++ window. Try it once — you won't go back.
